response.justification: The candidate is a capable senior/staff full-stack engineer with roughly 14 years of experience, but the role requires a Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI products or platforms. The resume shows only recent, peripheral exposure to AI-agent tooling and no evidence of cloud/AI strategy leadership, advising strategic customers, or building recognized AI platforms at the scale this role demands.
strengths: Broad full-stack and polyglot engineering background across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices
Long-running open-source ownership (GISCollective) showing initiative and product thinking
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or recognized AI products at Principal/Director scope
Lacks cloud platform strategy and customer-advisory experience required by the role
Seniority and influence footprint below Director-level IC expectations

key_factors.factor: Missing recognized AI expertise and products
Seniority and strategic-leadership gap vs Director IC bar
Broad engineering versatility and recent AI-agent tooling exposure
